overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with purple hair walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The journey progresses from a narrow commercial alley with red Japanese signage through an open intersection with towering skyscrapers, then up to an elevated industrial walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk commercial street with Japanese neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a rain-soaked alley lined with glowing red neon signs and vending machines

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: tall vending machine with illuminated advertisement panel showing a woman's face
large red neon sign with Japanese characters spanning across the street
black metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
futuristic vehicle parked along the curb with reflective wet surface
building front covered with various neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, bathed in red neon light from Japanese signage overhead. The camera moves forward past a vending machine on the right and parked cars on the left, with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and towering skyscrapers

events.description: narrow alley opens into wide urban intersection with tall buildings visible ahead
camera shifts to reveal player character with purple hair and white jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through a busy intersection while looking up at the massive skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: player character with purple hair and white jacket walking forward through crosswalk

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and street lights
large digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide, open intersection where the street expands to reveal towering cyberpunk skyscrapers against the rainy night sky. The player character with distinctive purple hair becomes visible walking ahead, crossing the street through the crosswalk as the camera pans up to show the massive scale of the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs leading to elevated walkway

events.description: approaching and ascending concrete stairs to upper street level
emerging from stairwell into different lighting conditions on upper level

agents.ego_description: walking up a flight of concrete stairs toward an elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two figures standing at the top of the stairs, one holding a glowing red umbrella

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
metal handrails along both sides of the staircase
elevated pedestrian walkway visible at the top of the stairs
traditional-style red paper lantern with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a concrete staircase leading to an elevated walkway, transitioning from the open intersection to a more enclosed stairwell. Two figures wait at the top, one holding a glowing umbrella, as the camera climbs the stairs and the massive skyscraper shifts to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with vending machines and power lines

events.description: emerging onto upper level street with industrial architecture and overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated industrial street past rows of vending machines and utility buildings

entered.detail: crisscrossing electrical wires and cables spanning across the street
multiple illuminated vending machines lined up along the right wall
chain-link fence running along the right side of the walkway
utilitarian building front with metal panels and minimal lighting
digital display showing stock prices or data in red and white text

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated industrial walkway with a grittier atmosphere, featuring overhead power lines and rows of glowing vending machines. The neon-drenched skyscrapers of the lower level are replaced by utilitarian industrial buildings as the character continues walking through the rain-soaked upper street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that evolves from a narrow neon alley into a sprawling intersection and finally onto a gritty industrial walkway. It begins by gliding past vending machines and parked cars on a street bathed in red neon light from Japanese signage, with the wet pavement reflecting the vibrant colors. As the path opens, the camera expands into a wide intersection to reveal a purple-haired character crossing the street beneath the overwhelming scale of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the character ascends a concrete staircase toward two waiting figures, moving from the open plaza into a more enclosed stairwell while the massive buildings slide to the side of the frame. Finally, the camera reaches an elevated industrial walkway where the polished neon skyline is replaced by a utilitarian atmosphere of overhead power lines and rows of glowing vending machines.
